description: Wait until packages are a week old before raising updates

prBodyNotes: ⚠️ Renovate's lock file maintenance functionality does not support validating Minimum Release Age, as the package manager performs the required changes to update package(s). Confirm whether your package manager perform its own validation for the Minimum Release Age of packages.

⚠️ Renovate's replacement functionality [does not currently](https://github.com/renovatebot/renovate/issues/39400) wire in the release age for a package, so the Minimum Release Age checks can apply. You will need to manually validate the Minimum Release Age for these package(s).

⚠️ Renovate's pin functionality [does not currently](https://github.com/renovatebot/renovate/issues/40288) wire in the release age for a package, so the Minimum Release Age checks can apply. You will need to manually validate the Minimum Release Age for these package(s).
⚠️ Renovate's digest functionality does not currently seem to usefully support minimum release age. You will need to manually validate the Minimum Release Age for these package(s).
⚠️ Minimum Release Age is only supported for Docker images from Docker Hub. You will need to manually validate the Minimum Release Age for other images.
